creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #26)

Bad performance is better than being nonfunctional and FS issues.

Realistically this option should be off by default as it breaks stuff and if one is using packages as provided and not Poudriere or the like this is not something they have the choice of. Not to mention UBLIO_DESC does not mention this any of the possible bugs it introduces.

This ain't some small edge case or the like here.
